meaning: 宇部[日本本州岛西南岸港市]
examples: Did you uBe to play the piano?
Ube has well-regarded technology that improves battery performance through additives mixed into the electrolyte.
The Ube dimmer replaces standard wall switches to control incandescent, LED and CFL lights.
Ube's technology is designed to control a new genre of electronic appcessories from a free smartphone app.
Ube's dimmer can be programmed to work with a variety of other IP based home devices as well.
